sqlMap.select: SELECT taskid, parentid, ownerid, creatorid, case when #primary# = 1 then creatorname else creatorName2 end as creatorname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(createdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as createDate, taskstatus, completerate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(completedate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as completedate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, hascomment, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as enddate, A.title as title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, newanswer, newrefer, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, B.mail as personemail, personattach, personcontentpath, taskpersonid, case when #primary# = 1 then taskpersonname else taskPersonName2 end as taskpersonname, memo FROM TBL_TASK A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.tenantid = B.tenant_id AND A.personid = B.cn WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT taskID, commentid, commentorid, case when #primary# = 1 then commentorname else commentorname2 end as commentorname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(commentdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as commentdate, comment FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT sharerid, case when #primary# = 1 then sharername else sharername2 end as sharername, case when #primary# = 1 then sharerdeptname else sharerdeptname2 end as sharerdeptname FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
SELECT taskid, attachid, filename, filepath, filesize FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND type = #type#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_TASK (parentid, ownerid, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, taskstatus, completerate, completedate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, startdate, enddate, title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, taskpersonid, taskpersonname, taskpersonname2, memo, tenantid) VALUES
(0, #ownerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #nowDate#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #nowDate#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #memo#, #tenantID#)
(#parentID#, #sharerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #nowDate#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #nowDate#, #sharerID#, #sharerName#, #sharerName2#, #sharerDeptName#, #sharerDeptName2#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #memo#, #tenantID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKSHARE (taskid, sharerid, sharername, sharername2, sharerdeptname, sharerdeptname2, updatetime, neworder, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #sharerID#, #sharerName#, #sharerName2#, #sharerDeptName#, #sharerDeptName2#, #nowDate#, 'Y', #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET importance = #importance#, hasshare = #hasShare#, hasattach = #hasAttach#, startdate = #startDate#, enddate = #endDate#, title = #title#, tasktype = #taskType#, updatetime = #nowDate#, personid = #personID#, personname = #personName#, personname2 = #personName2#, persondeptname = #personDeptName#, persondeptname2 = #personDeptName2#, taskpersonid = #personID#, taskpersonname = #personName#, taskpersonname2 = #personName2#, memo = #memo# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND taskID = #taskID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET hascomment=#hasComment# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND (taskid = #taskID# OR parentID = #taskID#)

UPDATE TBL_TASK SET hascomment=#hasComment# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND (taskid = #taskID# OR parentID = #taskID#) AND 0 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# )

sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCOMMENT (taskid, commentorid, commentorname, commentorname2, commentdate, comment, tenantID) VALUES (#taskID#, #commentorID#, #commentorName#, #commentorName2#, #nowDate#, #comment#, #tenantID#)
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET taskstatus = #taskStatus#, completerate = #completeRate# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND (taskid = #taskID# OR parentid = #taskID#)
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET personattach = #personAttach#, personcontentpath = #personContentPath# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND (taskid = #taskID# OR parentid = #taskID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND commentid = #commentID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND type = #attachType#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL((SELECT delaycolor FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID#), '##FF0000') as delaycolor

SELECT taskID, parentID, ownerID, creatorID, creatorName, creatorName2, importance, hasAttach, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startDate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as endDate, title, taskType, taskStatus, completeRate, completeDate, personID, personName, personName2, taskPersonID, taskPersonName, taskPersonName2, hasComment, memo FROM TBL_TASK WHERE
taskstatus != 3 AND
taskstatus = 3 AND
((taskPersonid = #memberID# AND creatorid = ownerid) OR personid = #memberID#) AND
creatorid = #memberID# AND parentid = 0 AND tasktype != 1 AND
creatorid = #memberID# AND parentid = 0 AND tasktype != 1 AND
title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%') AND
taskpersonname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%') AND
taskstatus = 1 AND
taskstatus = 2 AND
taskstatus = 3 AND
taskstatus = 4 AND
( (startdate >= #startDate# and startdate <= #endDate#) or (enddate >= #startDate# and enddate < #endDate#) or (startdate < #startDate# and enddate >= #endDate#) ) AND (personid = #memberID# or ownerid = #memberID#) AND
tenantid = #tenantID# ORDER BY startDate DESC, taskid DESC

SELECT COUNT(taskID) FROM TBL_TASK WHERE taskPersonid = #memberID# AND personid = taskpersonid
AND title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
AND taskpersonname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(taskID) FROM TBL_TASK WHERE creatorid = #memberID# AND parentid = 0 AND tasktype != 1
AND title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
AND taskpersonname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
AND tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCONFIG (userid, delaycolor, autodelete, tenantid) VALUES (#memberID#, #delayColor#, #autoDelete#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKATTACH (taskid, filesize, filename, filepath, type, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #fileSize#, #fileName#, #filePath#, #taskType#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASKCONFIG SET delaycolor = #delayColor#, autodelete = #autoDelete# WHERE userid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_TASK WHERE
taskid = #taskID# or parentid = #taskID#
taskid = #taskID#
parentid = #taskID#
AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE taskid = #taskID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE taskid = #taskID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
